item.title: if you guys come to @aiDotEngineer Singapore i will personally lead a tour to the best cai fan i kno...
item.description:
if you guys come to @aiDotEngineer Singapore i will personally lead a tour to the best cai fan i know! may 15-17
still recruiting a couple speakers, dm if mutuals and want a VIP tour of 🇸🇬 https://t.co/oajuFKoLs8
--- @swyx | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 61
item.author: @swyx
